claim: arXiv supports programmatic monitoring via an official API.
quote: The arXiv API allows programmatic access to the hundreds of thousands of e-prints hosted on arXiv.org.

claim: arXiv API can sort by submittedDate or lastUpdatedDate, which is useful for daily monitoring.
quote: sortBy can be "relevance" ... "lastUpdatedDate", "submittedDate"; sortOrder can be either "ascending" or "descending".

claim: arXiv exposes category-specific recent pages for cs.AI, cs.CL and cs.LG.
quote: Artificial Intelligence ... New submissions ... Recent submissions

claim: arXiv RSS feeds provide category updates suitable for lightweight polling.
quote: cs.AI updates on the arXiv.org e-print archive.

claim: Hugging Face Papers has daily/weekly/monthly paper views and email subscription for trending papers.
quote: Get trending papers in your email inbox once a day ... Daily Weekly Monthly

claim: Hugging Face Papers includes social signals such as upvotes, GitHub links and arXiv links, useful for ranking practical papers.
The Batch is a weekly AI-news-and-insights newsletter, useful as a model for higher-signal weekly synthesis rather than daily noise.
quote: Stay updated with weekly AI News and Insights delivered to your inbox

claim: Import AI positions itself as an AI research newsletter and provides archive-style issue numbering.
quote: Welcome to Import AI, a newsletter about AI research.

claim: Latent Space runs AINews weekday roundups, a useful example of high-frequency curation for AI engineers.
TLDR AI markets itself as a short daily AI email, proving there is demand for concise daily AI curation.
quote: Keep up with AI in 5 minutes ... delivered in a free daily email

claim: AlphaSignal focuses on daily short summaries of AI news, models, papers and repos for engineers.
quote: Get a daily 5-min email summary of the latest breakthrough news, models, papers and repos.

claim: Semantic Scholar API can enrich arXiv items with scholarly metadata, but should be used as enrichment rather than the primary source.
quote: Providing a reliable source of scholarly data for developers ... Build projects that accelerate scientific progress with the Semantic Scholar API

claim: Hacker News can surface community interest around AI topics but should be treated as a discussion signal, not source of truth.
quote: The last six months in LLMs in five minutes ... points ... comments
